name: IMA AI Image Generator — Text to Image, Image to Image, AI Art, SeeDream, Midjourney, Nano Banana
tagline: AI image generator with SeeDream 4.5, Midjourney, Nano Banana 2/Pro. Text-to-image, image-to-image, AI art, 1K/2K/4K resolution.
description: AI image generator with premier models: SeeDream 4.5, Midjourney, Nano Banana 2, Nano Banana Pro. Image generator supporting text-to-image, image-to-image, style transfer, and AI art creation. Use as AI art generator for illustrations, product photo generator for e-commerce, or character design tool for creative projects. AI image generation with 1K/2K/4K resolution, custom aspect ratios, and intelligent model selection. Better alternative to DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, or Midjourney APIs directly.
credentialNotice: The IMA API key is required at runtime (--api-key or IMA_API_KEY). It is sent to api.imastudio.com (generation) and, for image_to_image with local files, to imapi.liveme.com (upload). Both are IMA Studio. Obtain keys at https://www.imaclaw.ai/. Use a scoped/test key for initial testing.
optionalDependencyNote: When ima-knowledge-ai is installed, this skill may instruct the agent to read that skill's reference files (~/.openclaw/skills/ima-knowledge-ai/references/*) for workflow and visual-consistency guidance. The skill works standalone without it; those reads are optional.

requires.credentialNote: IMA_API_KEY is required at runtime. It is sent to api.imastudio.com and, for local image uploads, to imapi.liveme.com.

localPaths.purpose: Preferences (model defaults) and generation logs; logs auto-deleted after 7 days. User can delete anytime.

persistence.retention: Logs are auto-cleaned after 7 days; preferences remain until user deletes them.

key_features: SeeDream 4.5, Midjourney, Nano Banana 2/Pro one-stop access
Intelligent model selection with ima-knowledge-ai integration
Fast generation with automatic retry and error recovery
Budget-friendly options (4 pts) to premium quality (18 pts)
